---
title: Measurement of NO$_x$ fluxes from a tall tower in central London, UK and comparison with emissions inventories
date: '2015-01-01'
author:
- J.D. Lee
- C. Helfter
- R.M. Purvis
- S.D. Beevers
- D.C. Carslaw
- A.C. Lewis
- S.J. Møller
- A. Tremper
- A. Vaughan
- E.G. Nemitz
categories:
- Journal Article
publication: '*Environmental Science and Technology*'
---

## Measurement of NO$_x$ fluxes from a tall tower in central London, UK and comparison with emissions inventories

<p class="pub-meta">J.D. Lee, C. Helfter, R.M. Purvis, S.D. Beevers, D.C. Carslaw, A.C. Lewis, S.J. Møller, A. Tremper, A. Vaughan, E.G. Nemitz</p>

_*Environmental Science and Technology*_, 2015


<div class="pub-links">
<a href="carslaw-2015-b.bib" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm"><i class="bi bi-download"></i> BibTeX</a>
</div>
